title: Quarterly DepMap refresh + re-authentication process
context: Upstream resources release new versions; the catalog must stay current and re-authenticate models on a cadence. A documented quarterly DepMap refresh + re-authentication process, with a named steward, keeps the catalog trustworthy. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Document the quarterly DepMap refresh + re-authentication process with a named steward.
acceptanceCriteria: Process documents how a new DepMap release is pinned, diffed against the prior release, and re-aggregated; drift is flagged as an explicit task.
Re-authentication step re-checks every catalogued model against the current ICLAC register + Cellosaurus flags on each refresh.
A named steward owns the cadence; the process records source versions per refresh.
Process is deliverable-document only; no controlled/NC data introduced.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: REFRESH-PROCESS.md documenting the quarterly refresh + re-authentication process and named steward.
